title: Manchester Airport Welcomes Â£4.5M Government Funding for Domestic SAF Production at Stanlow
content: Manchester Airport has welcomed new funding from The Department for Transport towards the development and production of Sustainable Aviation Fuels (SAF) at its fuel facility. Essar and NorthPointe Energy â€“ who are both developing plans for SAF production facilities at Stanlow in the North West â€“ were collectively awarded Â£4.5m of funding.
author: Analysts Account
